data.change_summary: Fixed three lineage edge cases: (1) safe_plan_hash_backfill now handles 'start before plan, complete after plan' — when snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation and plan_hash are both None and the entry is still Running, both are populated from the current snapshot since no prior plan existed to conflict with; terminal entries remain untouched. (2) Duplicate-row repair in record_task_run_start now pre-merges the canonical (collapsed) entry into the raw row before backfill, so that in duplicate-row states the most complete metadata from all duplicates is preserved rather than potentially picking the stale first raw row. (3) merge_attempt_entries now merges snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation from the secondary entry when the primary's is None, preventing duplicate cleanup from permanently dropping the only provenance-bearing copy.
outstanding_risks: Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.
Pre-existing flaky checkpoint test (worktree_adapter_excludes_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits) intermittently fails due to environment issues — unrelated to these changes.

steps.description: Added snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation merge to merge_attempt_entries in model.rs:325-328: when the primary entry's snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation is None, it is now filled from the secondary entry, matching the existing pattern for plan_hash, run_id, and outcome_detail

Updated safe_plan_hash_backfill in fs.rs:2628-2669 to handle the no-plan-yet edge case: when snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation is None AND plan_hash is None AND the entry is still Running (not terminal), both fields are populated from the current snapshot. Terminal entries with no provenance continue to be skipped via is_terminal() guard.

Added canonical pre-merge in record_task_run_start duplicate-row repair path (fs.rs:3027-3037): before calling backfill_running_entry, the raw row at existing_index is merged with the canonical (collapsed) existing_entry via TaskRunEntry::merge_attempt_entries, so that metadata from the most complete duplicate is preserved even when the first raw row is the stale copy. A PartialEq comparison detects whether the merge changed the row.

Replaced legacy_open_row_without_plan_hash_not_mislabeled_after_plan_evolution test with running_entry_created_before_plan_adopts_snapshot_on_revisit: the new test preseeds a Running entry with plan_hash=None and snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=None, persists a plan, replays record_bead_start, and verifies both plan_hash and snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation are populated from the current snapshot. Also verifies the plan_hash persists through completion.
Ran cargo test (1169 total: 357 lib + 128 integration + 1 doc + 683 unit, 0 failures), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check on changed files (clean)

validation_evidence: cargo test: 1169 total tests passed (357 lib + 128 integration + 1 doc + 683 unit), 0 failed
cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
cargo fmt --check: src/adapters/fs.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs all clean

running_entry_created_before_plan_adopts_snapshot_on_revisit: verifies Running entry with no provenance adopts snapshot plan_hash and snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation on revisit after plan persistence, and retains them through completion
terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset: existing test confirms terminal entries with no provenance are NOT populated (is_terminal guard works correctly)
safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged: existing test confirms normal provenance-based backfill still works
safe_backfill_skips_when_snapshot_evolved: existing test confirms evolved-plan safety check still works

merge_attempt_entries now merges snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation, preventing permanent provenance loss during duplicate cleanup — verified by existing named_terminal_replay_succeeds_with_multiple_attempts test exercising the merge path
Duplicate-row repair pre-merges canonical entry into raw row via TaskRunEntry::merge_attempt_entries before backfill_running_entry, ensuring most complete metadata is preserved

All prior round tests continue to pass: terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields, json_fill_none_fills_absent_option_from_overlay, plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot, explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render
